notes: Transcripts/captions are not exported: the official YouTube Data API v3 does not allow downloading captions for arbitrary public channels without owner permission.

official_methods.purpose: Resolve channel and read uploads playlist (contentDetails.relatedPlaylists.uploads)
Enumerate uploads playlist to collect video IDs
Fetch metadata/statistics for video IDs in batches of 50

output_layout.manifest.json: Export summary (inputs, counts, errors, and notes)
output_layout.videos.jsonl: One JSON object per video (analysis-friendly; stable JSON keys)

preconditions: Pass --live to execute network reads and write the dataset
Output directory must be empty unless --overwrite/--yes or --resume is used
risk_reasons: Read-only API methods (GET) + local dataset files

verification_plan.notes: On completion, the tool writes a manifest with counts and SHA256 fingerprints for key outputs.
